partnerships.name: Daydream Silicon Valley
partnerships.description: A 40 person beginner friendly game jam in the Bay Area.
highlights: Largest West Coast event at 40 participants
$5000+ funds raised with a $2000+ prize pool
6 engaging workshops covering all aspects of game development
